titleStmt.title: SII 27.186: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 186. (A.R. No. 597 of 1929-30.) HANDĀḌI, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of Heggaḍe Gōpālakṛishṇa temple.
This is dated Śaka 1464, Śubhakṛit, Āśvija śu. 12, Wednesday corresponding to 1542 A.D., September 20.

It registers a gift of lands for the maintenance of a maṭha by Aṇṇu-haḍavaḷa, younger brother of Īśarahaḍuvaḷa who got it built in the temple of Gōpināthadēva constructed by Saṅku-heggaḍe. The gift was made with the approval of the residents of the village. It states that Atyappa-voḍeya was ruling the rājya (perhaps the same as Bārakūru-rājya) under the orders of the king. This governor may be the same as Achchappa-oḍeya reffered to in No. 185 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēṁ namaḥ śrī sarasvatyaiṁ namaḥ śrī gurubhyōṁ namaḥ nirvighnamastu
namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśaka varuṣa 1464 saṁdu Ayidaneya vartamānada śubha
krutu saṁvatsarada Āśvija śuddha 12 yu budhavāra sūyyōdaya puṇyakāladalu śrī ma
nmahārāja rājādhi paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa veṁkaṭādrirāya mahārāyaru vijaiyanagarada
sihāsanadaliddu sukharājyaṁ geyivakāladali Ārāyara nirūpadiṁda Atyappavoḍeyaru
rājyavanāḷuva kāladalū saṁkuhegaḍeyaru kaṭisida dēvālyada śrī gōpīnātha dēvara divyaśrī pā
da padmaṁgaḷa saṁnidhiyalū mābuseṭiya baḷiya yīsarahaḍavaḷana taṁma Aṁṇuhaḍu
vaḷanu kaṭisida maṭhada dharṁmake barasida śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare brahmūra grāmadoḷa
ge nānu baddha brahmadāyada mūlada bāḷa catussīmeya vivara haṁdāḍi yoḷage saḷa
ya gadde mūḍalu hariva bacaliṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu bhaṁḍāritiya bageyiṁdaṁ ba
ḍagalu paḍuvalu Ugrapaḷidēvara dēvasvadiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu Ugrapaḷidēvara dē
vasvada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu gade 1 ke bittu mu 5 kke gēṇi mu 20 ke teṟuha 98 ke muḍabayalo
ḷage naṁjanagade mūḍalu nāruseṭiyara gaḍi teṁkalu cōḷiyakēriya bastiyagaḍi paḍuva
lu biṁnāra baḷiyavaragaḍi baḍagalu biṁnāra baḷi yavara gaḍiyiṁtī catussīmeyoḷaguḷa
du bittuva mu 2 ke gēṇi mu 8 ke teṟuva haṇa 86 bālaṇa tiṁmayyanakaylu koṁḍabāḷu mūḍalu deśe
lu Aṁṇiseṭiya maṭhada bage hegaḍeyara maṭhada bage Attiyaḍi gadde yeraḍu gade teṁkalu hegge
ḍeyara saṁtānadavara gaḍi paḍuvalu tiṁmarāya seṭigaḍi baḍagalu harivatōḍina gaḍiyiṁ
tī nālku gaḍiyiṁda voḷaguḷa gadde 3 ke bittuva mu 6 ke gēṇi mu 30 ke teṟu ha 810 dāsara
bage mūḍalu mūrukēriya halaragaḍi teṁkalu sojege Aṁṇiseṭi saṁtānadavara gade
paḍuvalu mūrukēriya halaragaḍi baḍagalu mūrukēriya halaragaḍi Adaṟa koḍaṇa ga
de mūḍalu teṁkalu mūrukēriya halaragaḍi paḍuvalu dānasāleyagaḍi baḍagalu tiṁ
ma rāyaseṭṭiya gaḍi yī nālkugaḍiyiṁdaṁ voḷaguḷadu bittuva bhūmiI mu 6 kegē
ṇi mu 15 ke teṟu 84 Alihiriyadēvarige dēvasva Akki mu 2 yippaḍilu mūḍalu
nāraṇa seṭi kuḍinīra dharṁmadagaḍi teṁkalu kōṭiya kēriya halara gaḍipaḍuvalu
baḍagalu bēhārigaḷa gaḍi yiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁdaṁ voḷadu bittu mu 25 ge gēṇi mū
rake teṟu 91 ceoṭikēri mūḍalu kōṭikēri halarabage teṁkalu nāruseṭiyara gaḍipa
ḍuvalu nīruhariva baccalagaḍi baḍagalu nīruhariva baccalu nāruseṭira gaḍi yiṁtī
nālkugaḍiyiṁda voḷage bittuva mu 3 ke gēṇi mu 8 ke teṟul 3 beṁṇepadu
roḷage kaṁke gade mūḍalu saṁkahegaḍeyagaḍi teṁkalu biḷikeṟigaḍi paḍuvalu po
dugaseṭigaḍi baḍagalu dēve gade gaḍiyiṁtī nālkugaḍiyiṁda voḷage bittuva
mu 2 ke gēṇi mu 8 ke ha 15 voḷageṟimūḍalu duguseṭi saṁkarana saṁtānadavara
gaḍi teṁkalu paḍuvalu nāraṇaseṭi gaḍi baḍagalu beṭu maṁṇu nāruseṭira gaḍi
yiṁtī nālkugaḍiyiṁda voḷaguḷadu bituva mu 1 ke gēṇimu 4 ke teṟu Þ2 ma
pāḍi kaṁkegade mūḍalu kekuḍa makaḷagade teṁkalu nāraṇaseṭigaḍi paḍuvalu
harivasālina gaḍi baḍagalu nāruseṭaragaḍi yiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁda voḷaguḷa
vamu 2 ke gēṇimu 5 ke teṟul 2 Uddinagadde mūḍalu kekuḍemakaḷa
gaḍi teṁkalu Aḍapa ṁkaḷagaḍi paḍuvalu kōṭikēri halaragaḍi baḍagalu
Aṁṇu haḍuvaḷana gaḍiyiṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁda voḷage bittuva mu 2 ke gē
ṇi mu 10 ke teṟu 88 Āruvāra cakāroḷage duga Uṁkrapaḷi biṭṭa
du saṁkara gaddeya keḷagaṇa Aśadagadeya malaṇaru bituva mu 1 .
gēṇi mu 7 ke hiriyadēvara dēvana mu 1Þ niḍuṁpaḷi Uḷūradide Aki mu
19 haṁdāḍi nāruseṭi saṁtānadavaru biṭṭa Aruvāra gaṁjikōṭi
Aki mu 17 Aṁtu Akimu 144 keteṟu 444 dēvasva Akkimu
4 5 ge Akkimu 20 gaḷidu śuddhama 133 nū Akkiyanū
sahiraṁṇyōdaka dānadārādattavāgi haṁdāḍiyalūru sa
mastara voppadla Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyi yalli naḍeyauḷadeṁdu ba
rasida śilāśāsana śubhamastu dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāśrēyōnu pālanaṁ . dānāsarggamavā
pnōti pālanādacutaṁ padaṁ . sudattaṁ paradattaṁ
vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā . ṣaṣṭirvaruṣa sahasrā
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 27.186 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
